title: Crisp Earthy Beetroot Stir-fry
description: This light and crisp Korean-style dish features balsamic vinegar for a tangy twist, combined with tenderized beetroot in a gluten-free base, making it perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Slice the beetroot into thin rounds using a mandoline or very sharp knife. Sprinkle with salt and let rest for about 30 minutes.

While resting, prepare the marinade by whisking together balsamic vinegar, sesame oil, rice vinegar (if using), minced garlic, ginger, salt, and pepper in a small bowl until well combined. Stir in cornstarch to make it a paste-like consistency if needed for thicker flavor coating.
Coat each beetroot slice with the marinade mixture and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for about 15 minutes or until golden brown, flipping once during cooking.
Remove from oven and sprinkle sesame seeds over slices before serving. Garnish with sliced green onions if desired.
Serve hot as part of your lunch meal.
